programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent accidentally locks Hank and Wanda in Corner Gas; Emma tries to get out of making Davis's special bread.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Davis tries to get Brent to join his rugby team; Brent's more focused on inventing a new rugby chant; Hank and Karen convince Lacey to start selling pizza in the Ruby.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene isolates herself from her co-workers at Wellman Plastics, leaving them with the impression she is an elitist snob; Louise decides to teach Harris an expensive life lesson; Jackie is determined to keep the restaurant running.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Carol gives birth, Ross and Susan almost miss the event; Joey befriends an unmarried pregnant woman.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Finds Out
programme.desc: Rachel discovers Ross' feelings for her when he goes out of town on a business trip.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross' New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel decides to look up her former boyfriend (Cosimo Fusco) when she is distraught over Ross' new girlfriend (Lauren Tom).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.sub-title: A Country Club, a Yokel and a New Boss
programme.desc: Georgie's plan to make new clients at the local country club backfires when its outdated policies upset Audrey; Mandy struggles to prove herself at work.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Birthdays, Babies and Emotional Support Chickens
programme.desc: It's Beverly Rose's first birthday, but it's not all cake and candles as Becky and Emilio disagree on what kind of party they should have; Jackie is introduced to someone who wants to be more than friends.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Breast Milk
programme.desc: While tending his son, Ross expresses his displeasure when Phoebe tastes Carol's breast milk to check the temperature.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel's grumpy downstairs neighbor (Larry Hankin) dies and leaves all his belongings to the girls.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The group is amazed when Phoebe marries a Canadian ice dancer (Steve Zahn) to help him get his green card.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Birthdays, Babies and Emotional Support Chickens

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey's not invited to the Harvest Dance; Emma's dreaded jelly salad; Hank falls for highway worker.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent behaves differently when Wanda wears a skirt to work; feeling empowered, she tests the limits of her feminine charm, but Brent's new attitude toward her may not be motivating.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: The band Thunderface reunites; a song Brent wrote back in high school has Lacey investigating his mystery crush; Oscar shoots a fundraising video for the Seniors' Center.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Wanda repairs junk to re-sell at the community yard sale; Oscar, Emma, and Davis become obsessed with Karen's high-end beauty serums.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.desc: Lacey's not invited to the Harvest Dance; Emma's dreaded jelly salad; Hank falls for highway worker.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Protest, Drug Test and One Leaves the Nest
programme.desc: Harris' job is in jeopardy after joining a protest she strongly believes in, leading to tense discussions within the family; Jackie makes a visit to Wellman Plastics only to realize the company is instituting supervised drug testing.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank's premonitions freak Wanda out; Lacey fixes the pothole.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: When Emma gives Brent flack over his coffee drinking, he vows to quit cold turkey if she quits knitting; as Brent struggles in a caffeine free world, Emma takes up a new pastime.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey starts a coffee shop newsletter; Oscar's childhood dream.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey's friend Connie comes to Dog River; Davis thinks Karen would make a bad undercover cop.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host,Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.sub-title: A Cold Mom, a Brother Daddy and a Prison Baby
